markdown:
# Great Weapon Master

You gain the following benefits.

## Heavy Weapon Mastery

When you hit a creature with a weapon that has the H property as part of the [[attack]] action on your turn, you can cause the weapon to deal extra damage to the target. The extra damage equals your [[proficiency Bonus]].

## Hew

Immediately after you score a [[critical_hit Hit]] with a Melee weapon or reduce a creature to 0 [[hit_points Points]] with one, you can make one attack with the same weapon as a [[bonus_action Action]].
